attrs.placeholder: Briefly summarize your issue or request (e.g., 'Unable to access email')

title.value: (Provide detailed information about your issue or request, including any steps to reproduce the problem or specific requirements)
Add tags (e.g., Network Issue, Software Bug, Access Request)

attrs.placeholder: Select the type of request
Choose the category that best fits your issue
Select the urgency level (e.g., High)
Select your office location (e.g., Headquarters)
Select the number of users affected (e.g., Individual, Multiple Users)
Choose the urgency (e.g., Critical)
Select when the issue occurred
Select the impacted systems (e.g., Email Services, VPN Access)

children.label: Type of Request is Service Request

attrs.placeholder: Select the service you are requesting
Select your preferred completion date
Enter the cost center or budget code (if applicable)
Specify the item or service you need (e.g., 'Adobe Photoshop installation')
Explain why you need this item or service

children.label: Type of Request is Change Request

attrs.placeholder: Select the type of change (e.g., Normal Change)
Select the planned date and time for implementation
Select the items that will be affected (e.g., Servers, Applications)
Provide a detailed description of the proposed change
Explain the need for this change
Describe potential effects on systems and users
Outline the steps to implement the change
Detail steps to reverse the change if necessary

title.value: Attach relevant files (e.g., screenshots, error messages)
